title: Generate CSV Output for Sales Report
scenario: Write a CSV output for a sales report. The output should contain the date, product name, sales amount, and profit. The input will be a list of dictionaries containing sales information.
constraints: Must be a single CSV file
Must include the required sales information fields

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the CSV output is syntactically valid.
Check if the CSV output accurately represents the input data.
Check if the CSV output correctly defines the fields for the sales information.
